commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a guarded fast path for ordinary embedded assistant text deltas and new regressions for directive-tail and stripped-directive streaming behavior.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +65. Total +101 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction of the linked Windows/local-model starvation was established in this read-only review. The scoped subscriber behavior is source-reproducible from the changed code and focused regression tests.
